title: Sandwīp Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sandwīp with a Z-Score of +3.60. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Sandwīp has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is exceptionally high, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 11.6 GG, indicating a significant need for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is 77% and the wind speed is 14.7 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
